query:
INSERT INTO product_images (productId, imageUrl, imageKey, sortOrder, isPrimary, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/kNwVLJCEjOGRRefW.png', 'sofa-bed-01.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/yjMhZYgSdmmUhicA.png', 'sofa-bed-02.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'SB-002-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/ibqWBMbwTbFJwFzN.png', 'sofa-bed-03.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'SB-003-BGE'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/bpyZMVRQbDLAwcbk.png', 'sofa-bed-04.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'SB-004-CHR'
UNION ALL
SELECT id, 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/DVRaAVhrHMZqBDGP.png', 'sofa-bed-05.png', 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products WHERE sku = 'SB-005-TEA';
